S.FORM: Howard Bayne sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1942, ryax sa tay 28 nqu tay 7, Howard Bayne, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: ƒßowar* Œ≤ajne s~…ïraral ƒßja î…£a s~…ïis~…ïjuw na nŒ≤a, wal malaxmis~…ïuq qanij la. kawas~…ï taj ****, rjax s~…ïa taj ** nqu taj *, ƒßowar* Œ≤ajne, s~…ïquliq na p îunro. ¶~ ®inkƒßulan s~…ïa knita î s~…ïa Œ≤rŒ≤iru î lis~…ïts~…ï o* national Œ≤as~…ïketŒ≤all as~…ïs~…ïo ¶~ ®iation plajers~…ï
